message:
fix: add PT_SKIP_GLOBAL_LOCK=1 to 12 test files to prevent lock contention (bd-2thh)

Tests using `agent plan` or `agent apply` were failing intermittently
due to global lock contention when running in parallel. Added the
PT_SKIP_GLOBAL_LOCK=1 env var to all command helper functions in
affected test files.

Files fixed:
- automation_mode.rs (10 failures resolved)
- e2e_plan.rs, e2e_workflow.rs, e2e_cli_scenarios.rs
- summary_mode.rs, session_persistence.rs
- agent_plan_policy.rs
- agent_apply_dry_run_ok.rs, agent_apply_nothing_to_do.rs
- agent_apply_precheck_blocked.rs, agent_apply_policy_blocked.rs
- agent_apply_requires_yes.rs, agent_apply_constraints_blocked.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
